title: lachnagrostis littoralis
intro: Lachnagrostis littoralis, also known as salt-grass or salt-bush, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health due to its high content of antioxidants and essential oils. The health benefits of Lachnagrostis littoralis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and coughs. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by boiling the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by making a decoction by simmering the roots in water.
